action_set_definitions.name: get_system_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves current telemetry including telescope orientation (azimuth/altitude), dome status, weather conditions, and instrument temperature.

action_set_definitions.name: check_target_safety
action_set_definitions.description: Determines if the specified RA/Dec coordinates are currently above the horizon and within safe mechanical altitude limits.

action_set_definitions.name: set_ccd_temperature
action_set_definitions.description: Commands the cooling system to reach a specific temperature in Kelvin.

action_set_definitions.name: control_dome
action_set_definitions.description: Opens or closes the observatory dome shutter.

action_set_definitions.name: reset_azimuth
action_set_definitions.description: Performs a mechanical rotation reset to the zero-point to prevent cable wrap.

action_set_definitions.name: slew_to_target
action_set_definitions.description: Points the telescope mount at the specified celestial coordinates.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_observation
action_set_definitions.description: Starts the data acquisition sequence with a specific filter and exposure duration.

state_description.current_time_utc: The current UTC timestamp in the simulation.
state_description.telescope_azimuth: Current horizontal angle of the telescope in degrees (0-360).
state_description.telescope_altitude: Current vertical angle of the telescope in degrees (0-90).
state_description.status: Current operational status of the hardware (IDLE, SLEWING, OBSERVING, ERROR).
state_description.dome_open: Whether the observatory dome is open and ready for observation.
state_description.weather_condition: Current atmospheric quality (e.g., CLEAR, CLOUDY, STORMY).
state_description.instrument_temperature_k: Temperature of the CCD sensor in Kelvin.
